is_result.generated_code:
def compute_signals(bars: list, params: dict) -> list:
    n = len(bars)
    if n == 0:
        return []

    closes = [float(b.get("close", 0)) for b in bars]
    highs = [float(b.get("high", 0)) for b in bars]
    lows = [float(b.get("low", 0)) for b in bars]
    volumes = [float(b.get("volume", 0)) for b in bars]

    # Factor params
    ema_cross_fast = params.get("fast", 27)
    ema_cross_slow = params.get("slow", 153)
    adx_period = params.get("period", 12)
    atr_period = params.get("period", 12)
    ema_period = params.get("period", 12)

    # Calculate indicators
    ema_fast = ta_ema(closes, ema_cross_fast)
    ema_slow = ta_ema(closes, ema_cross_slow)
    adx = ta_adx(highs, lows, closes, adx_period)
    atr = ta_atr(highs, lows, closes, atr_period)
    ema = ta_ema(closes, ema_period)

    # EMA cross: fast - slow
    ema_cross = [ema_fast[i] - ema_slow[i] for i in range(n)]

    confirm_bars = 1
    signals = [0] * n
    long_count = 0
    short_count = 0

    for i in range(n):
        close_i = closes[i]
        adx_i = adx[i]
        atr_i = atr[i]
        ema_cross_i = ema_cross[i]
        ema_slow_i = ema_slow[i]

        # Market filter conditions
        if adx_i <= 15:
            long_count = 0
            short_count = 0
            continue
        if atr_i <= 0.001 * close_i:
            long_count = 0
            short_count = 0
            continue

        # Long entry: ema_cross > 0 and adx > 20 and atr > 0.0015 * close and close > ema_slow
        long_signal = (ema_cross_i > 0 and adx_i > 20 and atr_i > 0.0015 * close_i and close_i > ema_slow_i)
        # Short entry: ema_cross < 0 and adx > 20 and atr > 0.0015 * close and close < ema_slow
        short_signal = (ema_cross_i < 0 and adx_i > 20 and atr_i > 0.0015 * close_i and close_i < ema_slow_i)

        if long_signal:
            long_count += 1
            short_count = 0
        elif short_signal:
            short_count += 1
            long_count = 0
        else:
            long_count = 0
            short_count = 0

        if long_count >= confirm_bars:
            signals[i] = 1
        elif short_count >= confirm_bars:
            signals[i] = -1

    return signals
